title: Talking About Food 谈论食物
scene: 兄妹俩在讨论晚饭吃什么。

lines.en: Peter, I'm so hungry! What's for dinner tonight?
lines.zh: 彼得，我好饿！今晚晚饭吃什么？

lines.en: Mom said she's making tomato soup and noodles.
lines.zh: 妈妈说她要做番茄汤和面条。

lines.en: Yum! That's my favorite! Can we have some eggs too?
lines.zh: 好吃！那是我的最爱！我们也能吃点鸡蛋吗？

lines.en: I think so. What do you want to drink?
I'd like some orange juice, please.
Me too. Do you like spicy food?
lines.zh: 我也是。你喜欢辣的食物吗？

lines.en: Not really. I prefer sweet and sour food.
lines.zh: 不太喜欢。我更喜欢酸甜口味的。

lines.en: Same here! I love sweet and sour pork.
lines.zh: 我也是！我喜欢糖醋排骨。

lines.en: Mom makes the best sweet and sour pork!
lines.zh: 妈妈做的糖醋排骨最好吃了！

lines.en: I agree! Let's go help Mom in the kitchen.
lines.zh: 我同意！我们去厨房帮妈妈吧。
